# Episode #065 - Mary Wollstonecraft

Sep 6

Written By Philosophize This!

* * *

Episode #065 - Mary Wollstonecraft

* * *

This episode traces Mary Wollstonecraft’s fight against the social conditioning of women, highlighting how she challenged Enlightenment hypocrisy and argued for true equality through education.

Further Reading:

* _Mary Wollstonecraft: A Revolutionary Life_ by Janet Todd (2000)
* _Vindication: A Life of Mary Wollstonecraft_ by Lyndall Gordon (2005)
* _A Vindication of the Rights of Woman_ by Mary Wollstonecraft (1792)

See the [full transcript here.](https://www.philosophizethis.org/transcript/episode-065-transcript)
